---
title: "test_edda.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\contracts\test_edda.py"
loc: 49
complexity: 1
logic_score: 7.90
style_score: 3.86
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.99
---

## Intent
The `test_edda.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on mock_realm, test_transmutation, test_preservation_workflows, test_api_synthesis. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via mock_realm, test_transmutation, test_preservation_workflows, test_api_synthesis. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.core.edda](file://src.core.edda)

### Exports
- `mock_realm`
- `test_transmutation`
- `test_preservation_workflows`
- `test_api_synthesis`
